targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfMinute(timestamp) AS time, level, count() AS count FROM project_sos.service_events WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime AND service = 'room' GROUP BY time, level ORDER BY time

SELECT toStartOfMinute(timestamp) AS time, multiIf(message LIKE 'Room created%', 'Created', message LIKE 'room removed%', 'Removed', 'Other') AS event_type, count() AS count FROM project_sos.service_events WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime AND service = 'room' AND (message LIKE 'Room created%' OR message LIKE 'room removed%') GROUP BY time, event_type ORDER BY time

SELECT toStartOfMinute(timestamp) AS time, multiIf(message LIKE 'Player joined%', 'Joined', message LIKE 'Player left%', 'Left', message LIKE 'Player disconnected%', 'Disconnected', 'Other') AS event_type, count() AS count FROM project_sos.service_events WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime AND service = 'room' AND (message LIKE 'Player joined%' OR message LIKE 'Player left%' OR message LIKE 'Player disconnected%') GROUP BY time, event_type ORDER BY time

SELECT toStartOfMinute(timestamp) AS time, count() AS count FROM project_sos.service_events WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime AND service = 'room' AND message LIKE 'Game started%' GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT toStartOfMinute(timestamp) AS time, multiIf(message LIKE 'Token validated%', 'Token Valid', message LIKE 'Token invalid%' OR message LIKE 'Token expired%', 'Token Invalid', message LIKE 'Slot released%', 'Slot Released', 'Other') AS event_type, count() AS count FROM project_sos.service_events WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime AND service = 'room' AND (message LIKE 'Token%' OR message LIKE 'Slot released%') GROUP BY time, event_type ORDER BY time

SELECT toStartOfMinute(timestamp) AS time, count() AS count FROM project_sos.service_events WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime AND service = 'room' AND message LIKE '%rate limit%' GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT toString(timestamp) AS time, level, category, message FROM project_sos.service_events WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime AND service = 'room' AND category IN ('Room:Internal', 'Room:Chat') ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT toString(timestamp) AS time, level, category, message FROM project_sos.service_events WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime AND service = 'room' AND level IN ('WARNING', 'ERROR') ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 50
